message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title DeTrace Creature connection

participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_1" as W1
participant "«Creature: BBBBB»\nWheel_1" as B1
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_2" as W2
participant "B_1" as B_1
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_3" as W3
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_4" as W4
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_5" as W5
participant "«Creature: Frame»\nFrame" as Frame

W1 -> W2 : 1 changeOwner
W2 -> W2 : 2 checkMatrix
W2 -> W2 : 3 checkSlot
W2 -> W2 : 4 checkOwner
W1 ->x W1 : 5 connectError
B1 -> B_1 : 6 cdcdcdcdcd

W3 -> Frame : 1 changeOwner
Frame -> Frame : 2 checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame : 3 checkOwner
Frame -> Frame : 4 checkSlot
W3 -> W4 : 5 connect
W4 -> Frame : 6 changeOwner
Frame -> Frame : 7 checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame : 8 checkOwner
Frame -> Frame : 9 checkSlot
W4 -> W5 : 10 connect
W5 -> Frame : 11 changeOwner
Frame -> Frame : 12 checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame : 13 checkOwner
Frame -> Frame : 14 checkSlot
W5 ->x W5 : 15 connect

@enduml
```
